signals.headline: Lakers Win Playoff Opener 107-98 Over Rockets Despite Short-Handed Roster | YES (Boosts Series Win Odds) | HIGH confiden
signals.raw:
Lakers Win Playoff Opener 107-98 Over Rockets Despite Short-Handed Roster | YES (Boosts Series Win Odds) | HIGH confidence**  
Luke Kennard scored a playoff career-high 27 points and LeBron James added 19 points with 13 assists to lead the Lakers to a surprising victory over the Houston Rockets in Game 1 of their first-round series on April 19, capitalizing on Kevin Durant's injury absence.[1]  
T
